hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'apps/web' || exit 0; cd /Users/aelbuni/Projects/aelbuni/aigently-v1/apps/web && out=$(npm run build 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then errors=$(echo "$out" | grep -E '^.*(Error|Warning|error TS)' | grep -v 'node_modules' | head -20); printf '{"systemMessage": "⛔ Build failed after edit — fix before continuing:\n%s"}' "$errors"; fi
